parameters-en.Freq: Controls the stop frequency of the filter.
parameters-en.Wave: Selects the type of synth waveform.
parameters-en.Attack: Controls the attack, or the time if takes to get to the stop frequency. Is more obvious when Freq is set to higher values.
parameters-en.Pitch: Sets the pitch over a 2 octave range.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the synth and the dry signal. At 0%, no synth is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
